name: kiwe
description: Create Kiwe website, DSA AppShell theme, and combined handoffs without reading the full plugin codebase.

interface.longDescription: Provides compact Kiwe contracts, prompts, and handoff scaffolds for website/page, DSA AppShell theme, and combined outputs.
defaultPrompt: Create a Kiwe DSA AppShell theme handoff.
Create a combined Kiwe website and AppShell theme handoff.
